articles.author: dhojnacki
articles.title: Experts react: How the world is responding to the US-Israeli war with Iran - Atlantic Council
articles.description: We turned to our global network to explain how leaders in Europe, Asia, and Latin America are viewing the ongoing US-Israeli war against Iran.
articles.content: The US-Israeli war against Iran has now escalated into a regional conflict, and consequences are already extending far beyond the Middle East. After asking our Mideast experts to assess the impacts o… [+16785 chars]
